Tests and build script for the timeline app in Pebble firmware, including list view and no events scenarios.


## Files
- **[test_timeline_app_includes.h](test_timeline_app_includes.h.md)**: Header file for testing timeline app, including fakes, stubs, and helper functions.
- **[test_timeline_list_view.c](test_timeline_list_view.c.md)**: Tests for the timeline list view in the Pebble firmware, including setup, rendering, and cleanup.
- **[test_timeline_no_events.c](test_timeline_no_events.c.md)**: Tests the timeline app's behavior when there are no events, for both past and future scenarios.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing timeline and rendering components in the Pebble firmware.
